name: Hot Pink Rectangular Table Cover - Spritz™
description:
Infuse your party with a pop of color using the Hot Pink Rectangular Table Cover from Spritz™. This table cover adds a bold and energetic flair to your entertaining space. It provides practical protection against spills and stains and ensures easy setup. With generous dimensions, the hot pink rectangular table cover from Spritz™ is the ideal choice for any occasion, from birthday bashes to festive gatherings.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
